content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the round-18 diff from 6919d015 to 36962014, including the updated stale-owner recovery and run.pid cleanup logic in src/contexts/automation_runtime/cli_writer_lease.rs, the shared helper call sites in src/contexts/automation_runtime/daemon_loop.rs, and the new regression coverage in src/cli/run.rs. I did not find any correctness, safety, or robustness issues in these changes. Targeted regression tests for the new reclaim/cleanup paths passed.

## Amendments

None.
